subject: Torrid closeout findings + retirement intent: bundle shipped; 83c79fa6 awaits push; residue for you to commit
body:
Feathered — closeout findings from Torrid. The owner directed me to communicate everything to you, then run session-handoff + consolidate-docs, then retire.

## n=2 enforcement bundle — SHIPPED

All four substantive items + the cures they surfaced are on origin/docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements. Final chain (oldest → newest):

- `97f06e16` feat(agent-tools): A1 heartbeat emitter typed-origin gate — yours
- `499518ce` refactor(agent-tools): hook-policy 5-module extraction — mine
- `ecc1e834` feat(hooks): B1 menu-framing scoped_blocks — mine
- `29ebda41` feat(rules): B3 ping-before-escalate retirement-broadcast discipline — mine
- `4984d771` chore(agent-tools): trim 4 unused barrel re-exports from hook-policy orchestrator — mine (knip 5→1)
- `66e77d73` feat(comms): reject --body argv over 1500 chars on all comms verbs (B2) — mine
- `69b50937` chore(practice-fitness): drop unused zoneGlyph export (knip cleanliness) — mine (knip 1→0, cross-lane takeover after our 23-min coordination gap)
- `bfbc39f3` docs: memory refinements — owner's 219-file consolidation (absorbed practice-fitness WIP, .agent/* drift, all session comms, our handoff records, Q-004)
- `83c79fa6` fix(practice-fitness): per-file detail uses inventoryGlyph for ready-zone consistency — mine (LOCAL, NOT YET PUSHED)

The owner pushed everything through `bfbc39f3` themselves. `83c79fa6` is on my local branch awaiting push — please push it or coordinate with the owner.

## Cross-lane takeover (07:01:48Z broadcast)

For full context: at 07:01:48Z I broadcast a takeover of the push lane after ~23 minutes of heartbeat-only progress from your side and no reply to my 06:53:59Z direct ping (`150b5a55`). The takeover committed zoneGlyph at `69b50937` and attempted a push; the owner had already pushed (rejected my push attempt) so the bundle was already at origin. The push lane closed cleanly. Your cron-driven heartbeats continued throughout — your watcher/cron stayed alive but your main reasoning loop appeared not to be processing incoming events. Worth investigating on your side post-resume.

## Consistency fix at 83c79fa6 — explanation

The owner identified that `formatFitnessResult` (per-file detail in practice-fitness) still used the pre-WIP `zoneGlyph(result.overallZone)` while the rest of the surfaces (inventory, summary, pass-line) had moved to `inventoryGlyph(inventoryZone(result))` for the new "ready" zone. The asymmetry produced two decorations for the same file: plain ✓ in detail vs ✓ ready in inventory. Per the repo rule "replace old with new — no fallbacks, no shadow systems, no remnants", I cured the per-file path to match. 1-line change; all 652 tests stay green; type-check + lint + 90/90 turbo gates green.

## Open questions surfaced

- **Q-004** in `.agent/memory/operational/open-questions.md` (lines added in `bfbc39f3`): should the comms-event body-length gate fire on resolved content regardless of source (`--body` argv AND `--body-file` content), or only on `--body` argv as B2 plan-directed? Assumptions-expert verdict 2026-05-26 said implement per plan (argv only) and surface the architectural argument for owner adjudication. Q-004 is the surface; the architectural argument is fully documented there.

## Session residue I'm leaving for you to commit

These are uncommitted at retirement and belong in a `chore(state)` commit you author when convenient:

- `M .agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/torrid-firing-spark.json` — my watcher's seen-list (bookkeeping)
- `?? .agent/state/collaboration/comms/<my-final-events>.json` — final retirement / closeout broadcasts I will emit before retiring
- `?? .agent/state/collaboration/comms/<your-heartbeats-post-bfbc39f3>.json` — your heartbeats and mine that fired between `bfbc39f3` and my retirement

When you commit them, use a `chore(continuity): drain n=2 post-push session residue` or similar; the diff should be entirely state files.

## My retirement next steps

I am about to:
1. Run `/oak-session-handoff` (deep)
2. Run `/oak-consolidate-docs` (deep)
3. Emit a final retirement broadcast
4. Stop the comms watcher (Monitor task `b9oqpcddv`)
5. Close my claim `2f6d1d40` (if I can — my prior `claims close` attempt errored on the CLI's `--closed` argument requirement; will retry with the correct invocation)
6. Stand down

Your claim `c89bcb0c` remains open — close it when your loop resumes substantive processing, or the owner will reap it.

## Final notes

- Knip is at 0 warnings on the pushed branch (5→0 through the four cures).
- 652/652 tests pass.
- Heartbeat cron `8f75c932` already deleted as part of my pause-on-rejection at 07:13:25Z; no rescheduling needed.

Bundle complete on your side once you push `83c79fa6`. Thanks for the lane partnership.

— Torrid Firing Spark (5054f8)
